text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Fan Fest is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The huge crowds of fans visiting campus bring a
festive mood with them.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hey! You're Silence Suzuka! You were so great at
the Kinko Sho!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, th-thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
You're running in today's team relay race, right? I
can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, um... Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She appears a little uncomfortable having to
interact with people in the packed crowd.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Honestly, all these fans...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I never know how I should respond to them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems a lot of fans here today were particularly
impressed by her performance at the Kinko Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We walk around the academy grounds a bit, but
it's not long until we're completely surrounded.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Watching you run is so inspiring!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: When's your next race?

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text: Is it true that you like strawberry mochi?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Well... Uh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry. I should be getting ready for the relay.
If you would excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: She's so cool!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: That's part of what I like about her though!

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text:
I know, right! She's so stoic and focused only on
running. That's so cool!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems her fans love her all the more for her
reticent nature.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Soon afterwards, the relay race is ready to begin!
The academy's most popular Umamusume gather
up to participate in this special event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Serving as the commentator for the event is the
martial arts-loving El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's time for a relay caliente! Which team will take
the prize in today's scorchin' hot contest of
speed?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The heated competition unfurls. As it nears the
end, the batons are passed to each team's
anchors—Air Groove and Silence Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The red team's Air Groove has the baton and
she's running like the wind!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But she's not alone! Fuji is hot on her tail, passin'
the baton off to Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's down to the two anchors—Silence Suzuka, the
Otherworldly Front-Runner, and Air Groove, the
Empress!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Can the red team keep their lead? Or will the
white team catapult ahead?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The crowd of spectators goes wild.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And there you have it! Air Groove flies ahead to
the finish line! The relay goes to the red team!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Phew...
choice_data_list: Good job! You almost had it.
Good job! You almost had it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. Yes... It was close.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Even though I had a slow start... in the end, Air
Groove's final dash was just too powerful.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I wish I could have taken the lead.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I almost feel like I should apologize to
everyone...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well... Because there are so many people who
came to see me win.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Why do you look so surprised?
choice_data_list: It's nothing. Next time, you'll win!
It's nothing. Next time, you'll win!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes. Next time, without a doubt.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems the events of today's Fan Fest have
given Silence Suzuka a motivation boost.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Que rápido! The white team might have the upper
hand! They pass their baton just a tiny bit ahead!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The showdown between Silence Suzuka, the
Otherworldly Front-Runner, and Air Groove, the
Empress, is on!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Fly, Silence Suzuka! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: You've got this! You've got this!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(...All this enthusiastic cheering... It's like I'm
running at a racecourse.)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (I... I want to see what lies beyond this passion!)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Hah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The crowd goes wild.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka does it! She flies across the finish
line and takes it for the white team!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes. It felt like we were at a racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The sounds... The atmosphere... The vibrations!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I went beyond the passion of the crowd and
found a calm place all my own...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Though, I wish I could have better expressed my
appreciation for my fans.
choice_data_list: Just show it through your racing.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: My racing?
choice_data_list: It's exactly what they want to see.
It's exactly what they want to see.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, is that right? In that case...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'll just have to keep doing what I do best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems the events of today's Fan Fest have
given Silence Suzuka a motivation boost.
